results.title: What's Going on With Meta Stock?
Meta cuts 8,000 jobs and cancels 6,000 open roles as $135B AI spending reshapes the company
Meta just bumped its 2026 capex forecast up to as much as $145 billion
Meta Q1 2026: Nothing To Complain About (META)
Meta stock sinks after Q1 earnings as company raises 2026 AI spending forecast
Meta Stock Just Dropped 9%: Is This the Dip to Buy?
Worried About Meta's AI Spend? It's Already Paying Off.

summary: Q1 2026: revenue $56.31B (+33% YoY, beat), EPS $7.31 adj vs $6.79 est (beat), missed user growth. Capex raised to $125-145B. Stock fell 7-9% post-earnings. Announced ~8,000 layoffs (10% workforce) starting May 20, restructuring into AI pods. Released Muse Spark AI model.
